event_id.description: Unique event id. Generated if missing.

actor.description: Who performed or coordinated the action: hermes, claude-code, esbirrillo, stark, selenia, many, etc.

source.description: Where the request/event came from: cli, telegram, cron, fireflies, manual, claude-code, system.

objective.description: What this execution attempted to accomplish.

route.description: Routing decision: hermes_direct, claude_code, subagent, skill, cron, selenia, script.

external_writes.description: External side effects: notion, email, telegram, crm, calendar, etc.

user_confirmation.description: Whether {{USER_FIRSTNAME}} confirmed the action, or confirmation note.

result.description: Short result summary. No secrets or raw dumps.

next_action.description: Suggested next action or pending approval.

telegram_context.description: Optional summarized Telegram signal metadata, never raw full dumps by default.
